About AeroScout

Built for the people who fly

1,100+ airlines and operators. 190+ locations. One search.

AeroScout goes directly to the source — airline career pages, operator sites, and aviation recruiters — pulling every public pilot and cabin crew vacancy into one platform, updated daily.

Most pilots spend hours each week manually checking career pages. We scan them all so you can focus on what matters — getting into the right seat.

Get Started — Free
